headline: Intuit Anthropic AI Pact Tests Growth Story For Mid Market Investors
summary: Intuit (NasdaqGS:INTU) and Anthropic have entered a multi year partnership to build custom AI agents for mid market businesses. The collaboration will let businesses create secure, industry specific AI agents on Intuit's platform while bringing Intuit's financial intelligence into Anthropic's Claude products. The companies aim to give mid market and small businesses new AI tools to manage growth, operations, and financial decision making. For investors tracking Intuit, the agreement comes...
